description: L8 auto-download size limit (coverage-widening, hermetic): drive l3_set_setting autoDownloadSizeLimit and prove it round-trips through l3_dump_state.autoDownloadSizeLimit (default->13->30). autoDownloadSizeLimit is a GLOBAL int (MB) read by the file auto-accept/auto-download path (Prefs.getAutoDownloadSizeLimit; the desktop default is 30 MB, mobile 5 MB — _defaultAutoDownloadSizeLimitMb). This gate runs on ALL FIVE platforms, so the precondition accepts EITHER platform default (equalsAnyOf [30, 5]) plus the 30 a previous completed run restored — a genuinely dirty fixture (e.g. stuck 13) still fails it. Uses EXACT-value polling (state_equals) for the scalar field so a substring match can't false-green (codex P2). Ends restored to 30 (in the accepted set on every platform) so the fixture self-cleans even if interrupted. The download-DIRECTORY half (downloadsDirectory) is also surfaced in l3_dump_state for read assertions but is not toggled here (it is a native folder picker). Hermetic — no echo peer. Maps to feature L8.
